title: Cody's ImmersiveCraft
description: The continuation of a modpack project meant to make multiplayer more immersive and interesting.
body:
## Cody's ImmersiveCraft
This is a recontinued project originally started in 2022 to improve the SMP experience. 

It's intended to be played on multiplayer, likely with the end disabled. Loot such as the Elytra and Shulker Boxes have always been controversial, especially in multiplayer, and this mod tries to find thoughful replacements for them in the overworld.

## Version Guide

The normal version is the barebones clientside version, only the necessary and performance mods 
to join a server hosting ImmersiveCraft.

The "+" version has everything in the barebones clienside version, as well as QoL and Atmospheric mods to improve your experience on a server.

The Singleplayer ("SP") version has everything from the + version, as well as all the serverside only mods (like worldgen) so you can get the same experience on your own world!

I'll try and always released updates for all three versions at the same time

## Contact us!

If you need support, have questions, or want to learn about the private ImmersiveCraft server, you can join the discord: [https://discord.gg/WQYgsyrktZ](https://discord.gg/WQYgsyrktZ) and ask Cody!

You can also find ImmersiveCraft on Curseforge, where it was originally uploaded: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/codys-immersivecraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/codys-immersivecraft)
